name: tpm-site
description: Astro site for The Philosopher's Meme.

scripts.author:check: bun --silent run verify:content -- --quiet && bun --silent run tags:check -- --quiet && bun --silent run assets:locations -- --quiet && bun --silent run assets:shared -- --quiet && bun --silent run site:doctor -- --quiet && bun --silent run site:schema:check -- --quiet
scripts.build: bun --silent run build:raw && bun --silent run build:pdf && bun --silent run build:optimize
scripts.catalog:preview:fresh: bun --env-file=.env.catalog --silent run build && bun --env-file=.env.catalog --silent run preview
scripts.check: bun --silent run verify:content -- --quiet && bun --silent run tags:check -- --quiet && bun --silent run site:doctor -- --quiet && bun --silent run site:schema:check -- --quiet && bun --silent run platform:check && bun --silent run assets:locations -- --quiet && bun --silent run assets:shared -- --quiet && bun --silent run typecheck && bun --silent run lint && bun --silent run lint:packages && bun --silent run format && bun --silent run deadcode && bun --silent run catalog:check && bun --silent run test
scripts.check:release: bun --silent run test:accountability:release && bun --silent run check && bun --silent run build && bun --silent run verify && bun --silent run validate:html && bun --silent run test:e2e && bun --silent run test:catalog && bun --silent run test:catalog:site-instance && bun --silent run audit && bun --silent run secrets
scripts.coverage: bun --silent run coverage:unit && bun --silent run coverage:verify
scripts.coverage:check: bun test tests/config tests/eslint tests/src tests/types tests/lib tests/scripts tests/components tests/pages --reporter=dots --randomize --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov && bun --silent run coverage:verify
scripts.coverage:unit: bun test tests/config tests/eslint tests/src tests/types tests/lib tests/scripts tests/components tests/pages --randomize --coverage --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-reporter=lcov
scripts.docs-site:preview:fresh: SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=examples/docs-site SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/examples/docs-site bun --silent run build && SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=examples/docs-site SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/examples/docs-site bun run preview
scripts.fix: bun --silent run lint:fix && bun --silent run format:write
scripts.preview:fresh: bun --silent run build && bun --silent run preview
scripts.preview:release:fresh: bun --silent run build && bun --silent run verify && bun --silent run validate:html && bun --silent run preview
scripts.review:assets: bun --silent run assets:duplicates -- --review --quiet && bun --silent run assets:unused -- --review --quiet
scripts.review:markdown: bun --silent run lint:markdown && bun --silent run lint:mdx && bun --silent run format:markdown
scripts.test:a11y: bun --silent run build && playwright test tests/a11y
scripts.test:astro: astro sync --force && bun scripts/testing/sync-astro-test-store.ts && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:catalog: bun --env-file=.env.catalog --silent run build && playwright test tests/e2e/catalog-invariants.pw.ts
scripts.test:docs-site: SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=examples/docs-site SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/examples/docs-site bun --silent run verify:content -- --quiet && SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=examples/docs-site SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/examples/docs-site bun --silent run site:doctor -- --quiet && SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=examples/docs-site SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/examples/docs-site bun --silent run site:schema:check -- --quiet && SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=examples/docs-site SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/examples/docs-site bun --silent run build && SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=examples/docs-site SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/examples/docs-site bun --silent run verify && SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=examples/docs-site SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/examples/docs-site bun --silent run validate:html
scripts.test:e2e: bun --silent run build && playwright test tests/e2e
scripts.test:site-instance: SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=tests/fixtures/site-instance SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/fixtures/site-instance bun --silent run build:raw && SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=tests/fixtures/site-instance SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/fixtures/site-instance bun --silent run build:pdf && SITE_INSTANCE_ROOT=tests/fixtures/site-instance SITE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/fixtures/site-instance bun --silent run build:optimize
scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/config tests/eslint tests/src tests/types tests/lib tests/scripts tests/components tests/pages --reporter=dots --randomize --concurrent
scripts.typecheck: bun --silent run typecheck:astro && bun --silent run typecheck:tools
